root.defaultTitle: Next.js Boilerplate — Modern Web Application Starter
root.defaultDescription: A production-ready boilerplate built with Next.js 16, TailwindCSS 4, ShadCN UI, TypeScript 5, and next-intl. Start building scalable, fast, and accessible web applications.

home.title: Home
home.description: A modern, production-ready boilerplate with Next.js, TailwindCSS, and ShadCN UI. Build scalable web applications with dark mode, i18n, and beautiful components.
home.keywords: nextjs, tailwindcss, shadcn, boilerplate, react, typescript, starter template
